title: androsace villosa subsp. chamaejasme
intro: Androsace villosa subsp. chamaejasme, also known as Downy Androsace or Alpine Rose, is a flowering plant species in the Primulaceae family that grows in the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues, fever, and inflammation, due to its high content of alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Androsace villosa subsp. chamaejasme include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant activities. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to relieve symptoms of gastrointestinal disorders, such as diarrhea and nausea.
